free_text: Level density of 181W from analysis of neutron
* Proc. of the OECD Meeting "Nuclear level densities"
ENEA, Bologna, Italy, November 15-17, 1989. Edited by
G.Reffo et al, World Scientific, Singapore, p.210-221
The targets were metallic foils of thickness 18 mg/cm2
detectors employing a stilbene crystal and a FEU-30
efficiency for detection of neutrons was determined
by measuring the spectrum of prompt fission neutrons
Level density for 181W are given at  D0526007
SD: ref. on translation from YF was added.
